items.sentenceChinese: 他在職校學習汽車修理。
items.sentencePinyin: Tā zài zhíxiào xuéxí qìchē xiūlǐ.

items.sentenceChinese: 政府近年來非常重視技職教育。

items.sentenceEnglish: The government has placed great importance on technical and vocational education in recent years.

items.sentenceChinese: 這家公司的成功之處在於不斷創新。
items.sentencePinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī de chénggōng zhīchù zàiyú búduàn chuàngxīn.

items.sentenceChinese: 高等教育對國家的競爭力很重要。

items.sentenceChinese: 這兩家公司有著緊密的合作關係。
items.sentencePinyin: Zhè liǎng jiā gōngsī yǒuzhe jǐnmì de hézuò guānxì.

items.sentenceChinese: 這套軟體可以連結手機和電腦。

items.sentencePinyin: Tā de chuàngyè gùshì shì niánqīngrén de diǎnfàn.

items.sentenceEnglish: Ability is more important than a diploma.

items.sentenceChinese: 一技在身，走到哪裡都不怕。

items.sentenceEnglish: This plan is feasible in theory.

items.sentenceChinese: 許多成功的企業家以前都是黑手起家的。
items.sentencePinyin: Xǔduō chénggōng de qǐyèjiā yǐqián dōu shì hēishǒu qǐjiā de.
items.sentenceEnglish: Many successful entrepreneurs started out as mechanics.
items.sentenceVietnamese: Nhiều doanh nhân thành đạt trước đây đều khởi nghiệp từ thợ sửa chữa.

items.english: to build up; starting out from
items.sentenceChinese: 這家公司是靠賣五金起家的。
items.sentencePinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī shì kào mài wǔjīn qǐjiā de.
items.sentenceEnglish: This company started out by selling hardware.
items.sentenceVietnamese: Công ty này gây dựng cơ nghiệp từ việc bán đồ kim khí.
